strengths: Completed the circle cutting task within reasonable time frame
Demonstrated proper traction setup and maintained control throughout most of the cut
Successfully executed circle release phase to finish the task
weaknesses: Cut deviated outside the marked circle boundary at one point
Inconsistent precision during circle following phase
Could improve smoothness of cutting motion to maintain better line accuracy

drills.name: Circle tracking quarter-cuts
drills.description: Cut the circle in four controlled quadrants while maintaining traction, pausing between each quarter to reset positioning and verify accuracy.
drills.targets_weakness: Cut deviated outside the marked circle boundary at one point

drills.name: Traction-angle practice
drills.description: 10 repetitions of repositioning the Maryland to improve scissor entry angle and maintain optimal cutting geometry throughout the circle.
drills.targets_weakness: Inconsistent precision during circle following phase

progression_note: At the intermediate level, focus on converting your consistent completion ability into cleaner, more precise cuts. Work on maintaining steady traction and cutting angles to eliminate boundary deviations.
